source: The library will close early on Friday at 3 PM for maintenance. Normal hours resume Saturday. The book return slot stays open the whole time.
summary: The library closes early Friday at 3 PM for maintenance; normal hours resume Saturday and the return slot stays open.

source: Our new phone has a 12-hour battery, a waterproof case, and a faster processor than the previous model. It ships in three colors next month.
summary: The new phone has a 12-hour battery and is waterproof.

source: The recipe needs two cups of flour, one egg, and a pinch of salt. Bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes until golden.
summary: Mix two cups of flour, one egg, and salt, then bake at 180 degrees for 25 minutes. Serve with a chocolate sauce and fresh raspberries on top.

source: The committee approved the budget after a long debate. Three members abstained. The decision takes effect in January.
summary: After debate the committee approved the budget; three members abstained and it takes effect in January.
